name: ticks_far_above_threshold_remains_locked
description: current_hold_ticks=10 (already well past THRESHOLD) and incrementing further. Lock is True regardless. No upper bound on threshold check.
derivation: dynamic_activation = 1.5. threshold = 1.3. current_return (2.0) >= 1.3 -> ticks++ -> 10 + 1 = 11. currently_locked=True OR (11 >= 5) -> new_breakeven_locked = True. Locked AND base_stop_level (0.75) > 0 -> stop_trigger_level = max(0.75, 0.0) = 0.75 (floor does NOT change a positive base). Catches an impl that caps ticks at THRESHOLD (would yield 5 not 11) or floors a positive base.
